originalTitle: 4K Blu-rays are three for $33 ahead of Father’s Day
summary: If you know a dad with a predilection for physical media, he might really dig what you buy for him with this deal at Gruv. Ahead of Father’s Day on June 21st, the online seller (operated by Universal Pictures, in case you didn’t know) is letting you check out with three movies from a large […]
content: If you know a dad with a predilection for physical media, he might really dig what you buy for him with this deal at Gruv. Ahead of Father’s Day on June 21st, the online seller (operated by Universal Pictures, in case you didn’t know) is letting you check out with three movies from a large batch for $33 — no code required. Of course, you don’t need to be a dad, or be buying for one, to get in on these deals. To my knowledge, there is no dad verification system at work here. There aren’t many new releases looped into the sale. Rather, it’s focused on classics — modern as well as those from decades prior — that might round out dad’s collection without breaking the bank. Prices for movies at Gruv range from $13.99 or so to $20, so the total savings vary depending on what you buy. In the event that you only buy one 4K Blu-ray today and it’s your first purchase at Gruv, use the code FIRSTGRUV15 at checkout to save 15 percent off the cost. Here’s a handful of picks from the group that are eligible for the discount. [Product: North by Northwest | https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fgruv.com%2Fcollections%2Ffathers-day-4k-uhd-price-drops%2Fproducts%2Fnorth-by-northwest-4k-ultra-hd-uhd-_1000835548] [Product: Birds of Prey: And the Fantabulous Emancipation of One Harley Quinn | https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fgruv.com%2Fcollections%2Ffathers-day-4k-uhd-price-drops%2Fproducts%2Fbirds-of-prey-and-the-fantabulous-emancipation-of-one-harley-4k-ultra-hd-blu-ray-uhd-_1000750714] [Product: Ambulance | https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fgruv.com%2Fcollections%2Ffathers-day-4k-uhd-price-drops%2Fproducts%2Fambulance-4k-ultra-hd-blu-ray-uhd-_1000811458] [Product: Batman: Mask of the Phantasm | https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fgruv.com%2Fcollections%2Ffathers-day-4k-uhd-price-drops%2Fproducts%2Fbatman-mask-of-the-phantasm-4k-ultra-hd-uhd-_1000820102]
chineseTitle: 父亲节前夕，4K 蓝光光盘三张售价 33 美元
chineseSummary: 如果您认识一位偏爱实体媒体的父亲，他可能会非常喜欢您通过 Gruv 的这笔交易为他购买的东西。在 6 月 21 日父亲节之前，在线卖家（由环球影业运营，如果您不知道的话）将让您查看大型电影中的三部电影 [...]
chineseContent: 如果您认识一位偏爱实体媒体的父亲，他可能会非常喜欢您通过 Gruv 的这笔交易为他购买的东西。在 6 月 21 日父亲节之前，在线卖家（由环球影业运营，如果您不知道的话）将让您以 33 美元的价格从大批量中购买三部电影 - 无需代码。当然，您不需要成为一名父亲，或者为父亲购买商品，才能参与这些交易。据我所知，这里没有爸爸验证系统。促销中并没有太多新产品。相反，它专注于经典作品——现代的以及几十年前的作品——这可能会在不花太多钱的情况下丰富爸爸的收藏。 Gruv 的电影价格从 13.99 美元左右到 20 美元不等，因此节省的总费用根据您购买的内容而有所不同。如果您今天只购买一张 4K 蓝光光盘，并且这是您第一次在 Gruv 购买，请在结账时使用代码 FIRSTGRUV15 可节省 15% 的费用。以下是该组中一些有资格享受折扣的精选产品。 [产品：西北偏北| https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fgruv.com%2Fcollections%2Ffathers-day-4k-uhd-price-drops%2Fproducts%2Fnorth-by-northwest-4k-ultra-hd-uhd-_1000835548] [产品：《猛禽小队：哈莉·奎因的奇妙解放》| https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fgruv.com%2Fcollections%2Ffathers-day-4k-uhd-pric e-drops%2Fproducts%2F猛禽与哈雷的奇妙解放-4k-超高清蓝光-uhd-_1000750714] [产品：救护车| https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fgruv.com%2Fcollections%2Ffathers-day-4k-uhd-price-drops%2Fproducts%2Fambulance-4k-ultra-hd-blu-ray-uhd-_1000811458] [产品：蝙蝠侠：幻影面具
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
